nasb.text: Jesus took him aside from the crowd, by himself, and put His fingers into his ears, and after spitting, He touched his tongue with the saliva;

esv.text: And taking him aside from the crowd privately, he put his fingers into his ears, and after spitting touched his tongue.

cnv.text: 耶穌把他從人群中帶到一邊，用指頭探他的耳朵，吐唾沫抹他的舌頭，

ccb.text: 耶稣就带他离开众人走到一边，用指头伸进他的耳朵，又吐唾沫抹他的舌头，

csbs.text: 耶稣把他从人群中单独带到一边去，用指头伸进他的耳朵，吐唾沫来抹他的舌头，
